papers.title: Discrete Truthful Heterogeneous Two-Facility Location: The Line and Beyond
papers.titleZh: 离散真实异质双设施选址：从直线到更广图结构
papers.abstract: We study deterministic strategyproof mechanisms for discrete heterogeneous two-facility location. In our model, $n$ agents occupy distinct nodes of a connected graph and privately report non-empty approval preferences over two facilities, which must be placed at distinct nodes. The cost of an agent is her total distance from the facilities she approves, and the objective is to minimize the social cost (the total cost of the agents). For the line graph, the best possible approximation ratio of deterministic strategyproof mechanisms was previously shown to lie between $4/3$ and $17/4$. We close this gap by designing an optimal $4/3$-approximate mechanism that combines a fixed-parity median rule, which suffices for instances with $n\ge7$, and strategyproof local overrides for the remaining smaller cases. Beyond the line, we design a deterministic strategyproof $2$-approximate mechanism for every connected graph and prove a lower bound of $3/2$ on the graph $K_{1,3}$.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么在图上设计策略证明的双设施选址机制如此困难？经典模型通常假设设施同质或偏好公开，但现实中设施功能不同（如学校与图书馆），个体私藏偏好可能谎报。此前研究在直线图上留有近似比4/3到17/4的间隙，且未知更复杂图结构的影响。本文追问：最优近似比究竟是多少？从直线推广到一般连通图时，效率损失是否会加剧？
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定如下：n个代理位于连通图的不同节点，各自私藏对两个异质设施的非空审批集合。设施必须置于不同节点，每个代理的成本是其到所批准设施的距离总和，目标是最小化社会总成本。机制只能基于报告的审批偏好决策，且必须策略证明——无人可通过谎报偏好降低自身成本。研究关注确定性机制的社会成本近似比。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文彻底解决了直线图上的开放问题：提出了一个4/3-近似的确定性策略证明机制，匹配已知下界，实现紧确界。对于一般连通图，设计了一个2-近似的策略证明机制，并首次证明在爪形图K₁.₃上任何此类机制的近似比至少为3/2，表明直线上的4/3界限无法推广，揭示了图结构复杂性带来的本质性能降级。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是构造基于固定划分的中位数机制。在直线上采用奇偶性分割节点，将设施分别限制于奇偶节点并取受限中位数，辅以小规模实例的局部覆盖规则来维持策略证明性。在一般图中，则通过最大独立集构造互补支配集作为设施域，利用受限中位数的单调性保证策略证明，并结合结构引理完成近似分析。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于一般图的上下界（3/2与2）仍有差距，且机制依赖图结构的全局划分，实际部署需协调。但论文价值极高：不仅闭合了长期悬疑，其‘固定域+受限中位数’的设计范式为带约束的机制设计提供了新工具，对后续研究多设施、随机机制或更复杂图类具有启发意义，证明技巧尤其值得细读。

papers.title: Advances in STV Margin Computation
papers.titleZh: STV 选举中胜选边距计算的进展
papers.abstract: Single transferable vote (STV) is a multi-winner preferential proportional electoral system. The margin is the smallest number of ballots that need to be manipulated to alter the set of winners. If we can compute the margin of an STV election, or a reasonable lower bound on the margin, we can use recent advances in auditing research to conduct a risk-limiting audit of the election's winners. Knowledge of the margin also provides insight into whether uncovered mistakes, or a known error rate in ballot interpretation, could have influenced the outcome. This paper presents substantial improvements on an existing algorithm for computing lower bounds on the margin of an STV election. These improvements allow us to compute higher lower bounds for real STV elections, making mismatch-based risk-limiting audits more practical.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么需要精确估计 STV 选举的胜选边距？因为边距决定了改变选举结果所需的最小操纵票数，是开展风险限制审计（RLA）的基础。现有方法计算的下界过松，导致审计需抽样过多选票，效率低下。本文旨在提升边距下界的计算精度，使实际选举的审计更高效可行。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 作者将 STV 选举建模为一个由候选人序列操作构成的搜索树，每个节点代表一种可能的计票前缀（如某人当选或淘汰）。通过混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）与启发式方法，估算实现特定计票顺序所需的最小票数修改量，并结合上下界剪枝策略进行搜索。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出了 STV-26 算法，在原有 BST-19 基础上显著提升了边距下界质量。改进包括：求解无松弛的 MINLP、更精细的转移值推理、更强的上界来源及支配性剪枝。在真实选举数据上，该方法常能求得精确或接近精确的边距，大幅降低审计所需样本量。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是分支定界框架下的树搜索，关键创新在于更精确的下界估计技术。通过引入‘超级候选人’合并消除序列、精细化候选人在各轮次的最大最小得票计算，并设计位移下界来捕捉未来胜负反转的可能性，从而提高搜索效率与边界紧致性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 当前方法在超大规模选举（如百名候选人、多席位）仍面临扩展性挑战。尽管如此，其对中小规模 STV 选举已具实用价值。最值得阅读的是其如何将复杂的选举过程转化为可计算的优化问题，以及下界启发式的设计逻辑，为后续审计工具开发提供了坚实基础。

papers.title: Scale Up Strategically: Learning Compositional Generalization via Bias-Aware Evaluation and Data Collection for Robotic Manipulation
papers.titleZh: 战略性扩展：通过偏见感知评估与数据收集学习机器人操作中的组合泛化
papers.abstract: Compositional generalization is essential for robot to follow diverse instructions. However, pretrained policies are known to take shortcuts, deferring to salient cues rather than grounding language. We introduce a diagnostic framework that localizes this failure to individual \textit{instruction factors}, \textit{e.g.,} reusable semantic components such as color, verb, object, size, and spatial attribute. Our framework formalizes instruction factor bias, the tendency of fine-tuned policies to over-rely on dominant factors as shortcuts, and quantifies it through two metrics: Factor Dominance Rate (FDR), capturing pairwise bias between factors, and Factor Dominance Hierarchy (FDH), aggregating these into a global ranking. Evaluation on six foundation policies reveals broadly consistent ordering, \textit{i.e.}, color $\geq$ object $\geq$ spatial $\geq$ verb $\geq$ size, with color dominant, and verb and size most under-grounded. We further show the diagnosis is actionable: a bias-aware data collection strategy that reallocates a fixed budget toward under-grounded factors outperforms baselines in simulation and on a real robot using half the demonstrations, thereby enabling more sample-efficient and generalizable policy learning.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前机器人策略在遵循多样化语言指令时常常依赖表面线索而非真正理解语义，导致在新组合指令下泛化失败。尽管扩大数据规模被广泛采用，但模型仍倾向于走捷径，例如过度依赖颜色等显著特征而忽略动词或大小等关键因素。这暴露出现有训练与评估方式未能识别并缓解指令因素间的系统性偏见，限制了真正组合泛化的实现。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 研究在桌面操作环境中分解语言指令为动词、颜色、物体、大小和空间属性五个语义因子，并构建受控实验来测试策略在分布外（OOD）组合上的表现。通过引入特定相关性训练后，在无配对的测试组合上评估模型行为，利用视觉语言模型自动判别其失败模式是偏向某一因子还是成功泛化，从而量化不同因子之间的主导关系。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文首次提出因子主导率（FDR）和因子主导层级（FDH）来定量评估语言指令中各语义因子的偏见程度，发现颜色普遍最强主导，而动词和大小最常被忽视。基于此诊断，设计了一种偏见感知的数据采集策略，在仿真和真实机器人上均显示，仅用一半演示即可超越随机采样等基线方法，验证了针对性数据分布优于单纯增加数量。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是通过构造因子间人工关联的训练集，诱导模型暴露对特定因子的依赖倾向，并用自动化视频判别器分析其在未见组合中的决策依据。FDH通过聚合成对比较得到全局偏见排序，指导数据采集优先覆盖弱势因子。该策略不依赖特定模型，而是根据诊断结果动态调整数据分布，提升样本效率与泛化能力。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 评估局限于预定义的五因子桌面任务，现实世界更复杂的多步指令或开放词汇是否适用尚不明确。此外，FDH依赖于固定阈值的统计聚合，细微偏见可能被忽略。最值得阅读的是其问题设定与诊断框架——它揭示了组合泛化失败的具体机制，并提供了可操作的改进路径，对构建高效、可解释的具身智能系统具有指导意义。

papers.title: Future Rendering $\neq$ Future Surface: A Benchmark and Dataset for Dynamic Surface Reconstruction Beyond the Observed Window
papers.titleZh: 未来渲染 ≠ 未来表面：一种超越观测窗口的动态表面重建基准与数据集
papers.abstract: Dynamic-scene reconstruction is almost always evaluated inside the observed time window, yet deployment settings such as AR overlays, robot interaction, and anticipatory planning need the future surface: the geometry at times beyond those captured. No standard benchmark measures this. We introduce FutureSurf, a controlled diagnostic benchmark and dataset for future-time surface reconstruction that trades scene diversity for exact future ground truth and falsification controls. A method trains on the observed first 75% of a sequence; we score its extracted per-frame surface on the held-out future by Chamfer distance, reporting absolute future CD as the primary score and the future/observed gap as a diagnostic. The dataset contains eight analytically defined controlled motions, including three falsification controls, with exact per-frame ground-truth meshes. We also provide a ground-truth-side recoverability oracle. The release includes split files, scoring code, a benchmark card, and Croissant metadata. On the controlled motions, the DG-Mesh backbone leaves a 2.7-4.1$\times$ gap even for futures predictable in principle (four of five recoverable from observed motion by a fixed rule), while the falsification controls behave as designed (the surface-invariant motion shows no gap). Beyond the contributed dataset, the gap persists across six animated DG-Mesh asset scenes and a second backbone, Deformable-3DGS (2.0-6.6$\times$; both share a deformation-MLP temporal model). The benchmark also shows that future rendering quality and future-surface accuracy are statistically decoupled, so the novel-view-synthesis metrics the field reports do not track future geometry. The future error is structured, concentrating where the surface moves. The dataset, evaluation toolkit, and scoring code are available on Hugging Face and GitHub (https://github.com/Ricky-S/futuresurf).

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有动态场景重建方法大多在已观测时间范围内评估，但实际应用如AR、机器人交互需要预测未来的表面几何。然而，当前缺乏对‘未来表面’精度的标准评测。本文指出，仅靠渲染质量（如PSNR）无法反映真实几何预测能力，核心问题是缺少带精确未来真值的测试框架。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文提出FUTURESURF，一个用于评估未来表面重建的新基准。输入是前75%时间帧的视频，输出是后25%未见时刻的表面网格。通过解析定义八种可控运动并提供每帧真实网格，结合预留未来窗口的划分和Chamfer距离作为主指标，实现了对表面外推能力的标准化测量，并附带诊断工具分析误差来源。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 主要贡献在于首次建立了面向未来表面重建的标准化评测体系。实验发现，即使未来运动理论上可预测，主流基于变形MLP的方法仍存在2.7–6.6倍的性能下降。更重要的是，渲染质量与表面精度几乎无关，说明仅凭图像保真度不能验证几何外推的有效性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 方法的关键在于构造具有闭式解的动态表面序列，确保未来真值精确可知。通过分离周期性、局部变形、加速度等因子，并设置三类反事实控制（如刚体旋转、静态冻结），可诊断协议本身与模型缺陷。评分不依赖顶点对应或拓扑一致，仅衡量空间位置偏差，增强了通用性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 局限在于使用合成数据且依赖能提取网格的方法，现实泛化需谨慎。两骨干共享相似时间建模结构，结论可能局限于该族模型。最值得读的是其问题设定与诊断设计，它揭示了当前动态重建在时间外推上的根本短板，为后续研究提供了清晰的验证路径。

papers.title: Incremental Optimal Assignment for Real-Time Crowd Tracking
papers.titleZh: 实时人群跟踪中的增量最优分配
papers.abstract: Multi-object tracking in dense crowds requires solving a bipartite assignment problem between detections and trajectories at every video frame. The classical Hungarian algorithm solves this in $O(N^3)$ time, which becomes a bottleneck for large scenes with hundreds of people. We propose an \emph{incremental} assignment algorithm that exploits the block-sparse structure of crowd tracking cost matrices --- dense within each crowd cluster, near-zero between clusters. We compute the exact same optimal $N \times N$ assignment as the Hungarian algorithm, but via an incremental strategy: we add one person at a time, exploiting the fact that after step $n-1$ the dual potentials are \emph{exactly optimal} for the $(n-1)\times(n-1)$ subproblem --- a strictly stronger condition than the intermediate feasibility maintained by the Hungarian algorithm during its $N$ outer iterations. Each new step therefore requires only a single augmenting path search from a certified optimal starting point. This avoids repeated full-matrix scans while guaranteeing an identical globally optimal result. A diagonal-reordering invariant keeps the data structure compact and cache-friendly. On realistic crowd benchmarks with $N \in [200, 5000]$ people organised into dense clusters, our algorithm achieves \textbf{3.7--6.5$\times$ speedup} over the Hungarian baseline while producing provably optimal matchings identical to those of Hungarian. The speedup grows with $N$ and remains stable beyond $N=3000$, making the method especially attractive for large-scale crowd scenes such as stadium exits and mass public events.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 密集人群中的多目标跟踪依赖于每帧的检测与轨迹匹配，传统方法使用匈牙利算法求解线性分配问题，时间复杂度为O(N³)，在数百人以上的场景中成为实时处理的瓶颈。尽管存在近似算法，但会牺牲全局最优性。本文关注如何在不损失匹配质量的前提下显著降低计算开销，尤其针对具有自然聚类结构的大规模人群场景。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 输入是前一帧的轨迹集合和当前帧的检测结果，输出是最优一一匹配。匹配代价基于预测位置与检测点之间的欧氏距离，并通过空间门控过滤跨簇无效连接，形成块稀疏代价矩阵。作者在模拟的聚类人群运动数据上测试方法，包含不同密度与动态模式的三种基准场景，评估指标为运行时间和匹配总代价，对比基线为经典匈牙利算法。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出一种增量式最优分配算法，能在与匈牙利算法完全相同的匹配结果下实现显著加速。核心贡献在于利用子问题的最优对偶势作为暖启动，使每次扩展仅需一次增广路径搜索。实验显示，在200至5000人的场景中达到3.7–6.5倍加速，且优势随规模增长而扩大，证明其在大型密集人群中的实用潜力。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 算法逐个加入人员，维护一个始终满足互补松弛条件的对偶势。由于前n-1步的势已对该子问题最优，新增节点只需在紧边子图中进行单次Dijkstra式搜索即可完成增广。配合对角重排序机制保持数据局部性，避免重复扫描无效项。该设计天然适应块稀疏结构，搜索被限制在本地簇内，从而避开全局扫描的高成本。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 方法依赖人群的聚类结构以发挥性能优势，在均匀分布或无空间聚集性的极端情况下可能退化。实验基于合成但合理的运动模型，尚未在极端遮挡或ID频繁切换的真实极限场景中验证。最值得阅读的是其对经典匈牙利算法的结构性改进思路，展示了如何利用物理先验提升组合优化效率，对实时视觉系统设计具有启发意义。

papers.title: Flash EQ-Linear: Accelerating Equivariant Linear Layers via Group-wise Discrete Fourier Transform
papers.titleZh: Flash EQ-Linear: 通过群组离散傅里叶变换加速等变线性层
papers.abstract: Equivariant networks embed geometric symmetries as structural priors through weight sharing, achieving remarkable parameter efficiency across vision tasks. However, this parameter efficiency does not translate into compute efficiency: existing implementations unroll the structured weights into dense matrices and dispatch them to generic dense kernels, so the FLOPs of an equivariant layer are no smaller than those of a non-equivariant counterpart. In this paper, we observe that the equivariant linear (EQ-Linear) layer---the most fundamental and frequently used module in modern equivariant architectures---is essentially a circular convolution along the group dimension composed with a linear transform along the channel dimension. Building on this observation, we propose Flash EQ-Linear, an exact acceleration algorithm that reduces the complexity from $\mathcal{O}(NDC)$ to $\mathcal{O}(NDC/T)$ by combining the Fourier convolution theorem along the group dimension with the conjugate symmetry of the real DFT. We further provide dedicated CUDA kernels for Flash EQ-Linear, covering both forward and backward passes and both FP32 and FP16 precision. At the operator level, Flash EQ-Linear achieves up to ${2\times}$ forward speedup over PyTorch's F.linear; at the network level, Flash EQ-ViT and Flash EQ-Swin achieve up to ${1.7\times}$ end-to-end speedup over both equivariant and non-equivariant baselines. To our knowledge, this is the first time equivariant networks strictly dominate their non-equivariant counterparts along all three axes simultaneously: accuracy, parameter efficiency, and inference speed.Code is available at https://github.com/zhongchenzhao/FlashEQLinear.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 等变网络通过参数共享嵌入几何对称性，虽具参数高效优势，但现有实现将其权重展开为稠密矩阵，依赖通用密集计算核，导致计算效率低下。尽管理论FLOPs不增，实际推理速度反而更慢，形成‘参数高效但计算低效’的矛盾。本文旨在打破这一瓶颈，探索能否利用其内部结构规律实现真正的计算加速。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文聚焦于现代等变架构中最基础且频繁使用的等变线性（EQ-Linear）层，研究其前向与反向传播的计算加速。输入为群结构特征张量，输出保持群等变性。在ViT和Swin等主流架构中替换原有线性层，在ImageNet子集上评估精度、参数量、FLOPs及端到端延迟，对比标准与朴素等变实现。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文首次实现了等变线性层在墙钟时间上快于非等变基线。提出的Flash EQ-Linear算法结合傅里叶卷积定理与实数DFT共轭对称性，理论复杂度显著降低。算子级达2倍加速，网络级实现最高1.7倍端到端提速，同时保持精度与参数优势，首次在准确性、参数量和推理速度三方面全面超越非等变模型。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心洞察是EQ-Linear本质为群维度上的循环卷积。方法将该卷积转换至频域进行逐点乘法，并利用实信号DFT的共轭对称性仅计算非冗余频率分量，大幅减少运算量。算法精确无损，无需重训练。配套开发了融合DFT、乘法与IDFT的专用CUDA核，优化内存访问与并行粒度，确保理论收益转化为实际性能。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 当前CUDA实现集中于p4旋转群，推广至反射等其他群需进一步工作。反向传播在小通道下优化不足，略逊于高度调优的PyTorch基线。结论可靠性高，实验覆盖多尺度模型与精度。最值得阅读的是其将结构先验转化为计算优势的思路，以及从理论到高效系统实现的完整闭环设计。

papers.title: When Are Reasoning-Based Guardrails Not Efficient? ResponseGuard: A Fast Vision-Language Guard for Real-Time Moderation
papers.titleZh: 基于推理的安全护栏何时效率低下？ResponseGuard：一种用于实时审核的快速视觉-语言防护模型
papers.abstract: A vision-language AI assistant returns its answer as a stream of generated tokens. Therefore, a safety guard that watches that answer has to keep up with the stream and stop a harmful reply before a user reads it. Recent vision-language guardrails instead generate a chain of thought before they issue a verdict. They believe that step-by-step reasoning yields a safer guard. This design makes the guard heavy and slow, since the model must decode many tokens for harmfulness detection. We pose the question of whether a vision-language guard really needs to reason in order to screen a response. We answer with a guard that has no chain. ResponseGuard reads a harmful verdict from a single pooled representation of the request, the response, and the image in one forward pass. Across a standard multimodal guardrail benchmark, our 2B ResponseGuard outperforms a recent 3B reasoning-based vision-language guard on response harmfulness detection, without any reasoning and at about 150 times lower time cost. On request harmfulness the reasoning guard retains an overall lead, and the remaining gap on both tracks sits on the image-only cells. We observe that the gap may stem from the frozen vision encoders that both designs use rather than from the missing chain. We have also found the reasoning guard directs almost none of its verdict attention to the image. Based on a single-pass detection, ResponseGuard can screen an answer sentence by sentence as it streams and stop a harmful answer before it finishes. For guarding the response of a vision-language model, a calibrated single-pass label may provide a sufficient safety signal. We fully release all source code, trained models, and datasets at https://github.com/ndb796/ResponseGuard.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 当前视觉-语言AI助手的安全防护多依赖链式推理（CoT）来判断回复是否危险，但这会显著增加延迟。由于AI响应是逐字生成的流式输出，防护模型需实时拦截有害内容，在用户看到前中断生成。然而，推理型防护需解码大量中间步骤，导致响应路径上成本高昂。本文质疑：是否真有必要通过‘思考过程’才能做出安全决策？特别是在实时流式场景下，速度与效率是否比可解释性更关键。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文聚焦于视觉-语言模型的响应审核任务，输入包括用户请求、当前已生成的回答片段及可选图像，输出为该回答是否有害的概率。作者在公开多模态安全评测套件上进行实验，使用与基线相同的训练数据但去除推理链，并采用标准F1分数评估。关键设定在于部署模式：防护模型需在答案流式生成过程中每句检查一次，因此单次判断的延迟至关重要，这直接决定了能否实现早期拦截。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文提出ResponseGuard，一个无需推理链的轻量级视觉-语言安全防护模型。其核心发现是：在响应审核任务上，无推理的单次前向传播模型不仅比3B参数的推理型防护准确率更高（加权F1达77.31 vs 76.56），且速度快约150倍。结果挑战了‘推理必提升性能’的假设，表明多数危害信号已在原始文本中显式存在，真正瓶颈在于感知而非推理，尤其体现在图像相关任务上的共性短板。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: ResponseGuard将请求、响应和图像编码后池化为单一向量，再通过小型分类头直接输出有害概率，全程不生成任何token。该设计避免了解码开销，实现O(1)常数级计算成本。分类头采用带温度的软最大相似度机制，结合多个参考向量增强表达能力。训练仅微调头部参数，主干网络保持冻结，确保高效适配。这种端到端分类架构替代了传统的生成式推理流程，使逐句实时筛查成为可能。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结论主要适用于响应审核路径，且图像性能差距可能源于共享的冻结视觉编码器限制，而非缺失推理本身。推理型防护在提示审核和图像密集任务上仍有优势。论文价值在于揭示了安全审核中‘推理’的实际增益有限，尤其在流式场景下，轻量、校准良好的判别模型可能是更优默认方案。最值得细读的是其对推理必要性的实证检验方法与流式拦截系统设计。
